actions.intent: Take the visually easy high puppy first instead of respecting the buried lower target.
Spend the next action around the upper/mid board rather than immediately pivoting lower.
Keep playing the open top-side lane after the tempting puppy is already saved.
Continue upper-side cleanup and build dock pressure instead of routing to the lower puppy.
Delay the lower rescue again while the dock remains loaded with residue.
Spend another off-route clear before the lower puppy is secure.
Finally touch the lower route too late and overflow the dock.

notes: Verified false-easy fail: the high target is rescued first, then delayed lower-route play produces dock overflow.
